features: F5: Unit Tests for State Management Functions (meta-tests/test-utils-state.bats)

criteria.description: File meta-tests/test-utils-state.bats exists and loads the test helper via 'load helpers/test-helper'
criteria.testSteps: Verify meta-tests/test-utils-state.bats exists. Read the file and confirm it contains "load 'helpers/test-helper'" (or equivalent load directive).
criteria.threshold: File exists and loads test-helper

criteria.description: test-utils-state.bats sources harness/lib/utils.sh via source_harness_lib in setup so all state management functions are available
criteria.testSteps: Read test-utils-state.bats. Verify it calls source_harness_lib 'utils.sh' in a setup function before any tests run.
criteria.threshold: source_harness_lib 'utils.sh' is called in setup before tests execute

criteria.description: init_harness_state: creates config.json with correct userPrompt and projectType from arguments
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test calls init_harness_state with a prompt string and project type, then asserts config.json exists and contains the correct .userPrompt and .projectType values.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, config.json has correct userPrompt and projectType

criteria.description: init_harness_state: creates all required files (config.json, cost-log.json, regression/registry.json, progress.md)
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test calls init_harness_state and then asserts all four files exist: harness-state/config.json, harness-state/cost-log.json, harness-state/regression/registry.json, harness-state/progress.md.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, all four files exist after init

criteria.description: init_harness_state: cost-log.json starts with empty invocations array and totalCost of 0
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test calls init_harness_state and asserts cost-log.json has .invocations as an empty array and .totalCost as 0.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, cost-log.json has empty invocations and totalCost=0

criteria.description: init_harness_state: regression/registry.json starts with empty sprints object and lastFullRun as null
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test calls init_harness_state and asserts registry.json has .sprints as an empty object {} and .lastFullRun as null.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, registry.json has empty sprints and null lastFullRun

criteria.description: init_harness_state: progress.md contains the project prompt text and model name
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test calls init_harness_state with a known prompt, then asserts progress.md contains that prompt string and the model name.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, progress.md contains prompt and model

criteria.description: init_harness_state: respects environment variables MODEL, CONTEXT_STRATEGY, MAX_SPRINT_ATTEMPTS, COST_CAP_PER_SPRINT, TOTAL_COST_CAP
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test sets environment variables (e.g., MODEL=sonnet, MAX_SPRINT_ATTEMPTS=5) before calling init_harness_state, then asserts config.json reflects those custom values instead of defaults.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, config.json contains values from environment variables

criteria.description: init_harness_state: config.json uses correct defaults when environment variables are not set
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test unsets relevant environment variables before calling init_harness_state, then asserts config.json has default values (model=opus, contextStrategy=reset, maxSprintAttempts=3, etc.).
criteria.threshold: Test passes, config.json has default values

criteria.description: log_cost: appends an entry to cost-log.json with correct role, sprint, and token counts
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test initializes cost-log.json, calls log_cost with a role, sprint number, and JSON containing usage.input_tokens and usage.output_tokens, then asserts the entry was appended with correct values.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, entry has correct role, sprint, inputTokens, outputTokens

criteria.description: log_cost: handles missing usage fields gracefully, defaulting token counts to 0
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test calls log_cost with JSON output missing usage fields (e.g., '{}') and asserts the entry has inputTokens=0 and outputTokens=0 without error.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, token counts default to 0

criteria.description: log_cost: multiple calls accumulate entries in the invocations array
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test calls log_cost multiple times (e.g., 3 times) and asserts cost-log.json .invocations array has the expected number of entries (3).
criteria.threshold: Test passes, invocations array length matches number of log_cost calls

criteria.description: update_progress: appends a sprint entry to progress.md with correct sprint name from sprint-plan.json
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test installs sprint-plan-3sprint.json fixture, calls update_progress with a sprint number, and asserts progress.md contains the sprint name from the plan.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, progress.md contains sprint name from sprint-plan.json

criteria.description: update_progress: includes status and attempt number in the appended entry
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test calls update_progress with a specific status (e.g., 'PASS') and attempt (e.g., 2), then asserts progress.md contains '**Status**: PASS' and '**Attempt**: 2'.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, progress.md contains correct status and attempt

criteria.description: update_progress: includes merge SHA in the entry when provided
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test calls update_progress with a merge_sha argument (e.g., 'abc123') and asserts progress.md contains that SHA value.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, merge SHA appears in progress.md

criteria.description: update_progress: omits merge SHA line when merge_sha argument is empty or not provided
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test calls update_progress without a merge_sha (or with empty string) and asserts progress.md does not contain 'Merge commit' line.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, no merge commit line when SHA not provided

criteria.description: update_handoff: creates handoff.json from scratch when the file does not exist
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test ensures handoff.json does not exist, calls update_handoff, and asserts handoff.json was created with the correct structure (completedSprints, currentSprint, git fields).
criteria.threshold: Test passes, handoff.json created with correct initial structure

criteria.description: update_handoff: adds sprint number to completedSprints array
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test calls update_handoff with a sprint number and asserts .completedSprints contains that number.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, completedSprints includes the sprint number

criteria.description: update_handoff: updates currentSprint to N+1
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test calls update_handoff with sprint number N and asserts .currentSprint equals N+1.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, currentSprint is sprint_num + 1

criteria.description: update_handoff: updates git.latestTag and git.latestMergeSha
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test calls update_handoff with tag and SHA arguments, then asserts .git.latestTag and .git.latestMergeSha match those values.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, git fields contain provided tag and SHA

criteria.description: update_handoff: idempotent -- calling with the same sprint number twice does not duplicate in completedSprints
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test calls update_handoff with sprint 1 twice, then asserts .completedSprints contains sprint 1 exactly once (no duplicates).
criteria.threshold: Test passes, completedSprints has no duplicate entries

criteria.description: update_handoff: preserves existing fields (projectName, techStack, etc.) when updating
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test creates a handoff.json with custom projectName and other fields, calls update_handoff, then asserts the pre-existing fields are still present and unchanged.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, pre-existing fields remain intact after update

criteria.description: update_regression_registry: extracts criteria IDs from contract.json and adds sprint entry to registry
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test installs contract-3criteria.json fixture to the sprint directory, calls update_regression_registry, and asserts registry.json has a sprint entry with the correct criteria IDs and contract path.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, registry has sprint entry with criteria array and contractPath

criteria.description: update_regression_registry: no-op when contract file is missing (does not create registry entry)
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test calls update_regression_registry without any contract file and asserts registry.json remains unchanged (no new sprint entry).
criteria.threshold: Test passes, registry unchanged when contract missing

criteria.description: update_regression_registry: no-op when contract file is empty (zero bytes)
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test creates an empty contract file (touch), calls update_regression_registry, and asserts registry.json remains unchanged.
criteria.threshold: Test passes, registry unchanged when contract empty

criteria.description: update_regression_registry: handles contract with no criteria array gracefully
criteria.testSteps: Run test-utils-state.bats. Verify a test installs contract-empty-criteria.json (which has .criteria as empty array), calls update_regression_registry, and asserts the sprint entry has an empty criteria array (no crash or error).
criteria.threshold: Test passes, sprint entry created with empty criteria array

criteria.description: All tests in test-utils-state.bats pass when run via bash meta-tests/run.sh
criteria.testSteps: Run: bash meta-tests/run.sh 2>&1. Verify exit code 0 and all tests in test-utils-state.bats pass (no failures reported).
criteria.threshold: Exit code 0, all tests pass

criteria.description: Test names follow the 'function_name: description of behavior' naming convention consistently
criteria.testSteps: Read test-utils-state.bats. Verify every @test name follows the pattern 'function_name: description of behavior' (e.g., 'init_harness_state: creates config.json with correct prompt'). Each test name clearly identifies which function is tested and the specific behavior asserted.
criteria.threshold: All @test names follow 'function: behavior' naming convention

criteria.description: Sprint 1 regression: bash meta-tests/run.sh still executes successfully and all infrastructure tests pass
criteria.testSteps: Run: bash meta-tests/run.sh 2>&1. Verify test-infrastructure.bats tests still pass. Verify run.sh discovers and runs all .bats files including the new test-utils-state.bats.
criteria.threshold: All sprint 1 infrastructure tests still pass

criteria.description: Sprint 2 regression: all pure function tests in test-utils-pure.bats still pass
criteria.testSteps: Run: bash meta-tests/run.sh 2>&1. Verify all tests in test-utils-pure.bats still pass (slugify, sprint_pad, sprint_dir, json_read, file_exists).
criteria.threshold: All sprint 2 pure function tests still pass

outOfScope: Git operation tests (Sprint 4: test-git.bats -- git_create_harness_branch, git_create_sprint_branch, git_merge_sprint, etc.)
Hook validation tests (Sprint 5: test-hooks.bats -- on-generator-stop.sh, on-evaluator-stop.sh, on-stop.sh)
Edge case and error handling tests (Sprint 6: test-edge-cases.bats)
Any modifications to the existing harness source code in harness/lib/utils.sh
Any modifications to the existing tests/ directory
Any modifications to sprint 1 deliverables (run.sh, test-helper.bash, fixtures, test-infrastructure.bats)
check_cost_cap function testing (uses log_info, no testable state mutation)
